failures.description: The agent made an ill-formed ProductCatalogSearch invocation by passing only product_id as integer 0 instead of the required string product_id "1808611083" and item_id "1096508426".
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to query ProductCatalogSearch for item_id "1096508426" and product_id "1808611083" and answer from returned evidence. By index 2, the required IDs and schema were already available: both item_id and product_id were required strings. The Researcher instead prepared tool_args as {"product_id": 0}, omitting item_id and changing product_id to an integer value not grounded in the input. The subsequent tool output at index 3 confirms this malformed request with a SchemaError. The error was not resolved later.
